ocr.text: In the context of CRH plc's operations within the Construction & Building Materials sector, the Commercial construction
pipeline as of December 2023 presents a detailed overview of significant projects. The first entry, SkylineTower, is estimated to
cost $150M, categorized as Office, and is currently InProgress with a projected completion date of December 2024, situated in
The table includes headers that define each column, such as ProjectName, EstimatedCost, Status, CompletionDate, Category,
and Region, which collectively provide a comprehensive snapshot of the project's status. SkylineTower, with its substantial
financial commitment of $150M, reflects not only the scale of investment in commercial infrastructure but also the ongoing
development activities in the NorthEast area. The project is actively being worked on, with an expected finish by the end of
December 2024, showcasing the timeline and planning involved in such large-scale constructions. The categorization under
Office indicates that this project is aligned with the growing demand for commercial office spaces, further emphasizing the
strategic direction of CRH plc in meeting market needs. In conclusion, the Commercial construction pipeline table encapsulates
critical data through its structured format, ensuring that all aspects of the project—from its name and financial implications to
its status and anticipated completion—are accounted for without omission.
